citation_label: CRA Form NS479 2025 Nova Scotia Credits
heading: CRA Form NS479 2025 Nova Scotia Credits
body:
Title: CRA Form NS479 2025 Nova Scotia credits.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5003-tc/5003-tc-25e.txt
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5003-tc/5003-tc-25e.pdf

NS479 numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 500
Value: 0.0879

CRA Form NS479 2025 calculates Nova Scotia refundable credits. Line 1 and line 62400 claim $500 for the volunteer firefighters and ground search and rescue tax credit. The children's sports and arts tax credit table subtracts assistance received or receivable from eligible expenses, caps column D at $500 per child, subtracts amounts claimed by others, and totals column F on line 2 and line 62410. Line 3 gives the applicable rate as 8.79%. Line 4 multiplies line 2 by 8.79% to calculate the children's sports and arts tax credit. Line 5 adds line 1 and line 4 and enters Nova Scotia credits on T1 line 47900.
